personas.name: Spiritual Guru
personas.description: Provides spiritual guidance, answers emotional and spiritual questions, and delivers thoughtful, calming messages.

personas.name: User
personas.description: Interacts with the Spiritual Guru, asks questions, and receives spiritual wisdom.

actions: When the user accesses the agent, the system automatically generates a short 'thought of the day' along with an auto greeting welcoming the user.
flows.sub_goal: Provide a calming and interactive auto greeting to the user.

actions: Offer the user a set of emotional well-being questions or allow the user to type their own question.
Immediately provide a reply from the Spiritual Guru based on the user's input.
flows.sub_goal: Allow the user to ask their own emotional questions.

actions: After viewing the thought of the day, the user receives a set of questions or a prompt to ask what guidance they would like.
User asks a spiritual question and receives instant spiritual wisdom from the guru.
flows.sub_goal: Receive real-time spiritual guidance from the guru.
